reason: Response B exhibits the hallmarks of the most capable tier: a more original and specific choice (the hush after snowfall rather than the well-worn "rain on a roof"), richer sensory texture, and a genuinely conceptual layer comparing the snow-hush to musical rests and the idea of a sound "defined by subtraction." Response A is competent and well-organized but more conventional and predictable in both subject and structure, which fits a smaller model. The literary control and inventive framing in B point to my own (Opus) authorship.
